zh.lifeSummary: 當Ezekiel Herrick於1699年11月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利時，他的父親Samuel Herrick24歲，母親Mehitable Woodward21歲。他於1724年12月10日與Mary Rust在美國康乃狄克州托藍德考文垂結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1760年在美國康乃狄克州托藍德考文垂享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ezekiel Herrick于1699年11月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利时，他的父亲Samuel Herrick24岁，母亲Mehitable Woodward21岁。他于1724年12月10日与Mary Rust在美国康涅狄格州托藍德考文垂结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1760年在美国康涅狄格州托藍德考文垂享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Herrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old Norse personal name Eiríkr, Old Danish, Old Swedish Erik, itself from Proto-Scandinavian ain- ‘one, select’ + rík- ‘rule(r)’ + prosthetic H-.

Irish (Cork): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEirc ‘descendant of Erc’, a personal name meaning ‘speckled, dark red’ or ‘salmon’, and borne by a Christian saint. In Munster and Ulster this name has been changed to Harkin .

History: The English poet Robert Herrick (1591–1674) was the son of a wealthy London goldsmith, whose family had a long history in the town of Leicester. DNA analysis suggests that the modern surname is monogenetic, i.e. from a single eponymous bearer. The earliest known bearer of the name in Leicester was John Eirich, recorded as a burgess there in 1211. Leicester was one of the headquarters of the Viking army that conquered and settled the eastern midlands in the late 9th century, leading to the English adoption of many Old Norse personal names, such as Eirikr, as personal names. The initial aspirate is first recorded in the name of Nicholas Heyryke, recorded as a Leicester burgess in 1524.

variants.name: Harkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Cormac, Jarlath, Paddy.

Irish (Donegal) and Scottish (Lanarkshire and Midlothian): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarcáin ‘descendant of Earcán’, a byname or personal name formed from a diminutive of earc ‘red, bloody’; also meaning ‘piglet’.

English: from the Middle English personal name Hardekin, Harkin, a borrowing into late Old English of Middle Dutch Hardekin. It is a pet form of ancient Germanic Hardo (see Hard 4) + the Middle Dutch hypocoristic suffix -kin. The name of a (presumably continental) moneyer at Stamford is stamped HÆRƉCYN, HARƉCIN, and HARCIN on coins of the reign of Edward the Confessor.

nameMeanings.name: Ezekiel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, pronounced ‘iz-ee-kee-el’: meaning ‘God strengthens’ in Hebrew. This was borne by one of the major prophets. The book of the Bible that bears his name is known for its vision of a field of dry bones, which Ezekiel prophesies will live again (chapter 37). His prophecies were addressed to the Jews in Babylonian exile, after Nebuchadnezzar had seized Jerusalem in 597 bc .

en.lifeSummary: When Ezekiel Herrick was born on 6 November 1699, in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Samuel Herrick, was 24 and his mother, Mehitable Woodward, was 21. He married Mary Rust on 10 December 1724, in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1760, in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ezekiel Herrick est né le 6 novembre 1699, à Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Samuel Herrick, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mehitable Woodward, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mary Rust le 10 décembre 1724, à Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1760, à Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ezekiel Herrick am 6. November 1699 in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Samuel Herrick 24 und seine Mutter Mehitable Woodward 21. Er hat am 10. Dezember 1724 in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Rust geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1760 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten.

ja.lifeSummary: Ezekiel Herrickが1699年11月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスベバーリーで生まれた時，父Samuel Herrickは24歳，母Mehitable Woodwardは21歳であった。1724年12月10日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドコベントリーでMary Rustと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1760年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドコベントリーで61歳で死去した。

ko.Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리
ko.Preston, New London, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 프레스턴
ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.lifeSummary: Ezekiel Herrick(이)가 1699년 11월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Herrick(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mehitable Woodward(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1724년 12월 10일 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 커븐트리에서 Mary Rust(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1760년 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 커븐트리에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ezekiel Herrick nasceu em 6 de novembro de 1699, em Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Samuel Herrick, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mehitable Woodward, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Rust em 10 de dezembro de 1724, em Coventry, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1760, em Coventry, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ezekiel Herrick родился 6 ноября 1699 г. в местности бивирли, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Samuel Herrick было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mehitable Woodward, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Rust 10 декабря 1724 г. в местности ковентри, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1760 г. в местности ковентри, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ezekiel Herrick nació el 6 de noviembre de 1699, en Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Samuel Herrick, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mehitable Woodward, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mary Rust el 10 de diciembre de 1724, en Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1760, en Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 61 años.
